About Scott's Interior & Exterior

12+ years serving Louisville and surrounding areas

Scott's Interior & Exterior started with a simple goal: to provide Louisville homeowners with painting services that exceed expectations. We've been painting homes across Jefferson County for over a decade, building a reputation for quality and reliability.

Our approach is straightforward: meticulous preparation, premium materials, and skilled craftsmanship. We treat every home as if it were our own, ensuring flawless results and lasting beauty. We believe in clear communication, honest pricing, and a commitment to customer satisfaction.

We're proud to be a part of the Louisville community. From Old Louisville's historic homes to the modern developments in the East End, we're committed to enhancing the beauty and value of our city, one brushstroke at a time.

12+ Years in Business
800+ Projects Completed
97% Client Satisfaction
20+ Team Members
Scott's Interior & Exterior

Trusted house painter professionals serving Louisville, KY and the surrounding areas. Quality work, honest pricing, guaranteed satisfaction.
